name: Apricot Cream Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, flour, and salt in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add apricot juice and mix thoroughly.
3. Sift well-drained apricots to obtain 1 cup pulp and add gradually to the flour mixture, stirring until blended.
4. Place over rapidly boiling water and cook for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Add lemon juice.
6. Chill.
7. Fold in whipped cream. Makes 3 cups.
